subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Be thou not sorrowful, neither dwell upon the trials and tribulations that have befallen 'Abdu'l-Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق محزون مباش در فکر صدمات و بلایاء عبدالبهاء افت ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @poems and quotation from poetry, @review of publications, @personal instructions, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
